clusters.failureShape: Interactive elements have no visible focus indicator, or one too subtle to see, so keyboard users can't tell which element is focused.
clusters.fix: Give every focusable element a clearly visible, high-contrast focus indicator (e.g. an outline / focus ring). Don't remove the default outline without replacing it.

clusters.failureShape: A skip link stays hidden even when focused, so keyboard users can't see the bypass control they've tabbed to.
clusters.fix: Make the skip link visible on focus (e.g. reveal it with :focus styles that bring it on-screen) so keyboard users can see and use it.
